programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: Sylvia's simple life becomes complicated when Saul follows her home from their highschool reunion. 2023. Mexico, USA. Director: Michel Franco. Starring: Jessica Chastain, Peter Sarsgaard.

programme.title: Spiked: The Hunt For The Origin Of Covid-19
programme.desc: Explore the conspiracies surrounding Covid-19, and the risks of experiments performed in Today's bioloabs. 2024. UK. Director: David Herman.

programme.title: Killjoy
programme.desc: 3 month old Kathryn's father murdered her mother, he returns to raise her after serving just 22 months. Years later and she was still unaware. 2024. Australia. Director: Vincent Lamberti.

programme.desc: Queen Margrete rules most of Scandinavia, but a wild conspiracy puts her monarchy at risk. 2021. Denmark. Director: Charlotte Sieling. Starring: Trine Dyrholm, Soren Malling.

programme.desc: Archival footage and firsthand accounts uncover the development of the relationship between Princess Diana and her bodyguard. 2025. UK. Director: Amber Rondel.

programme.desc: An immigrant mother must act fast to protect her son, and possibly others, after discovering his obsession . 2025. United States. Director: Eric Lin. Starring: Lucy Liu, Lawrence Shou.
